delta.notes: With-skill agent correctly detected and adapted to PMD 7.x ruleset format changes (catching legacy ruleset path issues). Baseline agent missed this.

per_eval.notes: Both agents produced equivalent results: 11 violations found, text and XML reports generated
Both agents correctly used PMD 7.x --dir flag and found 2 duplication groups. With-skill agent initially documented legacy --files flags but adapted correctly at runtime
With-skill agent detected legacy PMD 6.x ruleset paths and adapted to PMD 7.x format. Baseline agent did not detect the path incompatibility.

notes: Key finding: PMD 7.x changed ruleset paths from rulesets/java/* -> category/java/*. Skill was updated post-test to document this.
Key finding: PMD 7.x CPD changed --files to --dir, and --file to --report-file. Skill was updated post-test.
Both with-skill and baseline agents ran the containerized PMD successfully without local install.
